summary: 11 film announcements, 10 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Magic School Bus
film.talent: Elizabeth Banks as Ms. Frizzle, Rob Letterman (Director)
film.announcement: Legendary is developing a live-action adaptation of Magic School Bus with Elizabeth Banks set to play Ms. Frizzle and Detective Pikachu director Rob Letterman attached to direct.

film.title: Untitled Daniels Event Pic
film.announcement: Sean Kaufman from The Summer I Turned Pretty is set to star opposite Matt Damon in a Daniels event film.

film.title: The Girlfriend
film.talent: Meghann Fahy, Glenn Howerton, Natalie Morales (Director)
film.announcement: Meghann Fahy and Glenn Howerton are set to star in The Girlfriend from director Natalie Morales, produced by XYZ Films and 21 Laps.

film.title: Summoner
film.announcement: Kevin Bacon is set to star in the horror film Summoner from Amazon MGM, written and produced by Jeremy Slater.

film.title: The Drama
film.announcement: The Drama featuring Zendaya and Robert Pattinson has received a streaming premiere date on HBO Max.

film.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2
film.announcement: The Devil Wears Prada 2 has booked a streaming release date on Disney+ and Hulu with DVD-Digital Bundle extras revealed.

film.title: Never Stop Chasing
film.announcement: Abramorama is set to release the documentary Never Stop Chasing about storm and tornado chaser Reed Timmer.

film.title: The Debut
film.talent: Jesse Eisenberg, Julianne Moore, Paul Giamatti
film.announcement: The Debut, a follow-up to Jesse Eisenberg's A Real Pain, has released its first trailer featuring Eisenberg, Julianne Moore, and Paul Giamatti.

film.title: The Dink
film.announcement: The Dink, an Apple film about pickleball featuring Jake Johnson and Ben Stiller, has released its trailer.

film.title: Blair Witch
film.announcement: A Blair Witch Project remake has set a 2027 release date.

film.title: Supergirl
film.announcement: Supergirl producer David Ellison has met with DC Universe heads James Gunn and Peter Safran, who are open to the project.

tv.title: Little House on the Prairie
tv.announcement: Little House on the Prairie showrunner teases Season 2 production details and discusses how women settled the West.

tv.title: Stuart Fails to Save the Universe
tv.announcement: Trailer released for Big Bang Theory spinoff Stuart Fails to Save the Universe, showing familiar faces in alternate universes.

tv.title: Not Suitable for Work
tv.announcement: Not Suitable for Work creator Mindy Kaling discusses the season 1 finale's cliffhangers and Season 2 status.

tv.title: Fool Night
tv.announcement: Netflix has unveiled the anime series Fool Night along with images from One Piece, Sparks of Tomorrow, and Bass x Machina at Annecy.

tv.title: The Everlasting
tv.announcement: A series adaptation of The Everlasting is in development at Netflix.

tv.title: Cross
tv.announcement: Ron Perlman has been cast to recur in Prime Video's Cross for Season 3.

tv.title: Thunder Road
tv.announcement: Outer Banks star Chase Stokes has joined Dennis Quaid in AMC's NASCAR drama series Thunder Road.

tv.title: Tetris: World Builders
tv.announcement: TeamTO and the Tetris Company have teamed up on Tetris: World Builders, an animated series.

tv.title: Unhinged
tv.talent: Zoë Kravitz, Sadie Sink, Troy Baker
tv.announcement: Netflix has set the immersive horror video game Unhinged starring Zoë Kravitz, Sadie Sink, and Troy Baker.

tv.title: Tulisa
tv.announcement: Paramount+ has set a docuseries about shamed X Factor judge Tulisa from Dorothy Street Pictures.
